title: Project Interop Definition
description: A project definition that binds source repositories, tool access policies, context files, and agent coordination metadata. See RFC-0001.

repo.description: Path to source repository. ~/  is expanded to $HOME.

branch.description: Default branch for new worktrees or checkouts.

tools.description: Tool scoping rules keyed by server identifier. See RFC-0002.

extensions.description: Implementation-specific data keyed by reverse domain notation.

toolsObject.description: Tool scoping rules keyed by MCP server identifier.

serverScopingRule.description: Scoping rule for a single MCP server.

allow.description: Glob patterns of tool names to permit.

deny.description: Glob patterns of tool names to forbid. Deny takes precedence over allow.

defaults.description: Default arguments keyed by tool name glob pattern.

files.description: Paths relative to the project's context store directory.

repoIncludes.description: Paths relative to the repository root. Glob patterns supported.

maxBytes.description: Advisory limit on total assembled context size in bytes.

maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of simultaneous agent sessions. Advisory.

launchObject.description: Agent launch configuration controlling prompt injection and environment.

prompt.description: Inline prompt text injected at agent launch.

promptFile.description: Path to a prompt file, relative to the context store.

env.description: Environment variables set in the agent process.

roleDefinition.description: A named role that scopes tool access and context for an agent.

description.description: Human-readable description of the role's purpose.

toolOverrides.description: Per-server tool scoping overrides applied on top of project-level rules.

contextOverrides.description: Context configuration overrides applied on top of project-level context.
